response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with recent, directly relevant work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) at re:cinq, plus strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD). Stack alignment is high and seniority comfortably exceeds the 6+ year bar, though Nest.js and Kotlin are not explicitly listed.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack experience across multiple senior roles
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work matches a required skill
Deep testing and engineering craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era tooling, workshops)
concerns: Kotlin/Java exposure is dated and limited
Cloud/containerization signal is partial (AWS CDK, Docker) with no clear Kubernetes production ownership at scale
